misc.title: Luffy's VA (71 y/o) joked today, “I’ve now become old. I’m happy to be playing a role that suits me perfectly. I don’t think I’ll live as long as Nozawa (Goku VA: 89y/o), but I’ll do my best for anoth
misc.text: Luffy's VA (71 y/o) joked today, “I’ve now become old. I’m happy to be playing a role that suits me perfectly. I don’t think I’ll live as long as Nozawa (Goku VA: 89y/o), but I’ll do my best for another 10 years or so.” She will also continue as Luffy in remake by WIT Studio.🧡

misc.title: Luffy voice actress Mayumi Tanaka after receiving the “Best Supporting VA” award at the 20th Seiyuu Awards for her role as Turbo Granny in Dandadan said: “I don’t think I’ll be able to live as long as
misc.text: Luffy voice actress Mayumi Tanaka after receiving the “Best Supporting VA” award at the 20th Seiyuu Awards for her role as Turbo Granny in Dandadan said: “I don’t think I’ll be able to live as long as Mako-san (Masako Nozawa,Goku Va), but I’ll do my best for another 10 years or so.”

items.title: Luffy's VA (71 y/o) joked today, “I’ve now become old. I’m happy to be playing a role that suits me perfectly. I don’t think I’ll live as long as Nozawa (Goku VA: 89y/o), but I’ll do my best for anoth
items.text: Luffy's VA (71 y/o) joked today, “I’ve now become old. I’m happy to be playing a role that suits me perfectly. I don’t think I’ll live as long as Nozawa (Goku VA: 89y/o), but I’ll do my best for another 10 years or so.” She will also continue as Luffy in remake by WIT Studio.🧡

items.text: Luffy voice actress Mayumi Tanaka after receiving the “Best Supporting VA” award at the 20th Seiyuu Awards for her role as Turbo Granny in Dandadan said: “I don’t think I’ll be able to live as long as Mako-san (Masako Nozawa,Goku Va), but I’ll do my best for another 10 years or so.”
